title: HealthBar
description: A lightweight and highly configurable health display.
body:
HealthBar adds a lightweight and highly configurable health display which is fully compatible with other mods and effects which change maximum health or how it is displayed. The healthbar can be repositioned, scaled, recoloured, made to visually alert you on low health, and features a customizeable text display of your current/maximum health using Java string formatting. 

This is effectively a rewrite of [SilentChaos512's HealthBar](https://github.com/SilentChaos512/HealthBar), created for personal ease of updating to newer minecraft versions.
